_comment: PreToolUse hook: nudge toward red-vs-blue before finalizing a high-stakes plan (crucible plugin, EXPERIMENTAL).
_usage: Manual-install fallback ONLY — use if the plugin's own hooks/hooks.json does not autoload (unverified in this repo; see bundles/crucible/README.md). Add this object to the hooks.PreToolUse array in .claude/settings.json (or ~/.claude/settings.json). Replace <CRUCIBLE_PLUGIN_ROOT> with the actual installed plugin path (e.g. ~/.claude/plugins/cache/crucible — verify the real path after install; it is NOT guaranteed to match this example).
